name: Hero · Clean studio

do: centered composition with the product floating at a slight 3D angle
single saturated background color taken from the brand primary
soft drop shadow under the product
dont: no overlay text on the image (overlay added separately downstream)

body: Amazon hero product listing image for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square format, centered composition. A single {{PRODUCT_NAME}} floating straight-on at a slight 3D angle on a {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} background. Soft drop shadow underneath. Photorealistic, studio-quality lighting. Product is the only subject — no people, no overlay text, no busy background. Crisp packaging readability is critical.

angles.name: Clean studio (default)
angles.description: The reference Barebells-style hero — solid color background, centered product.

angles.name: Luxury gold accent
angles.description: Premium feel with subtle gold accent lines and deeper shadow.
angles.prompt_modifier: Add subtle gold accent lines radiating from the product. Faint gold-dust particles in air. Deeper, more dramatic shadow beneath for a premium feel.

angles.name: Vibrant radial pop
angles.description: Background shifts from solid to a soft radial gradient for a more energetic hero.
angles.prompt_modifier: Background shifts from solid {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} to a soft radial gradient with the brightest point centered on the product. Slight color bloom around the silhouette. Energy without distraction.
